languages.text: После бессчетного количества оставленных позади поворотов, переходов, подъемов и спусков, отряд, наконец, достиг своей цели. Стены, неумолимо смыкающиеся вокруг, вдруг расступились в стороны, впуская нас в низкий широкий коридор, конец которого терялся во мраке.

Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.
languages.original_text: После бессчетного количества оставленных позади поворотов, переходов, подъемов и спусков, отряд, наконец, достиг своей цели. Стены, неумолимо смыкающиеся вокруг, вдруг расступились в стороны, впуская нас в низкий широкий коридор, конец которого терялся во мраке.

traits.locale_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. Suddenly, the walls were no longer closing in relentlessly on us; they moved aside and let us into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. Suddenly, the walls were no longer closing in relentlessly on us; they moved aside and let us into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

languages.text: Tras una secuencia interminable de giros, cruces, escaladas y descensos, la unidad por fin alcanzó su objetivo. Los muros que se habían cernido sobre nosotros dieron paso a un pasillo amplio pero de techo bajo que conducía a la oscuridad.
languages.original_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

traits.locale_text: Tras una secuencia interminable de giros, cruces, escaladas y descensos, la unidad por fin alcanzó su objetivo. Los muros que se habían cernido sobre nosotros dieron paso a un pasillo amplio pero de techo bajo que conducía a la oscuridad.

languages.text: Après d'innombrables virages, croisements, montées et descentes, l'escouade atteignit enfin son but. Les murs, qui jusqu'alors se refermaient inexorablement sur nous, s'ouvrirent soudain sur un large couloir au plafond bas qui s'enfonçait dans l'obscurité.
languages.original_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

traits.locale_text: Après d'innombrables virages, croisements, montées et descentes, l'escouade atteignit enfin son but. Les murs, qui jusqu'alors se refermaient inexorablement sur nous, s'ouvrirent soudain sur un large couloir au plafond bas qui s'enfonçait dans l'obscurité.

languages.text: 历经无数转向、穿行、攀爬与下降后，小队终于抵达了目的地。原本无情紧逼的墙壁豁然开朗，化作一道低矮但宽阔的走廊，一路延伸进黑暗之中。
languages.original_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

traits.locale_text: 历经无数转向、穿行、攀爬与下降后，小队终于抵达了目的地。原本无情紧逼的墙壁豁然开朗，化作一道低矮但宽阔的走廊，一路延伸进黑暗之中。

languages.text: Zahllose Kurven, Kreuzungen, Auf- und Abstiege später erreichte der Trupp endlich sein Ziel. Die Mauern, die uns so unerbittlich eingeschlossen hatten, öffneten sich plötzlich in einen breiten Gang mit niedriger Decke, der in der Dunkelheit verschwand.
languages.original_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

traits.locale_text: Zahllose Kurven, Kreuzungen, Auf- und Abstiege später erreichte der Trupp endlich sein Ziel. Die Mauern, die uns so unerbittlich eingeschlossen hatten, öffneten sich plötzlich in einen breiten Gang mit niedriger Decke, der in der Dunkelheit verschwand.

languages.text: Sayısız dönüş, geçiş, tırmanış ve inişten sonra manga nihayet hedefine ulaştı. Bir zamanlar etrafımızı amansızca saran duvarlar, aniden karanlıkta kaybolan alçak tavanlı, geniş bir koridora açıldı.
languages.original_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

traits.locale_text: Sayısız dönüş, geçiş, tırmanış ve inişten sonra manga nihayet hedefine ulaştı. Bir zamanlar etrafımızı amansızca saran duvarlar, aniden karanlıkta kaybolan alçak tavanlı, geniş bir koridora açıldı.

languages.text: 数え切れないほどの曲がり角や交差点、登り坂や下り坂を乗り越えた先、ついに部隊は目標地点にたどり着いた。かつては私たちを追い詰めるように迫っていた壁は、突然、広くて天井の低い通路へと開かれた。その通路は暗闇へと消えていった。
languages.original_text: Countless turns, crossings, climbs, and descents later, the squad finally reached its goal. The walls, once closing in relentlessly around us, suddenly opened into a wide, low-ceilinged corridor that disappeared into darkness.

traits.locale_text: 数え切れないほどの曲がり角や交差点、登り坂や下り坂を乗り越えた先、ついに部隊は目標地点にたどり着いた。かつては私たちを追い詰めるように迫っていた壁は、突然、広くて天井の低い通路へと開かれた。その通路は暗闇へと消えていった。
